aiModelSettingsDescription: Model settings for using AgentGoCoder's AI features. Select the AI model you want to use and configure its settings.
projectRootDescription: Set the directory that AgentGoCoder will recognize as the top-level path of the project. This path can be used as a reference point when referencing file paths.
sourcePathDescription: This is a list of source code paths that AgentGoCoder will reference when generating AI responses. The contents of specified files and folders can be provided as context to the AI.
autoUpdateDescription: Set whether to automatically update files based on code suggested by the LLM. When disabled, a confirmation message will be displayed before updating.
settingsSavedImmediately: Settings are saved immediately when changed.
geminiApiDescription: Set Gemini API key to use AgentGoCoder's AI features.
geminiApiRegistrationMethod: Registration: Create a new API key on Google AI Studio API key page.
geminiApiFunctionDescription: Enable AI code generation and analysis features.
externalApiKeysDescription: Set external API keys to use real-time information features. Get API keys from each service website and enter them here.
weatherApiDescription: Provides accurate weather information for Korea.
weatherApiRegistrationMethod: Registration: Sign up at Korea Meteorological Administration API Hub and get an API key.
newsApiDescription: Provides latest news information for Korea.
newsApiRegistrationMethod: Registration: Register an application at Naver Developer Center and get Client ID and Client Secret.
stockApiRegistrationMethod: Registration: Get a free API key from Alpha Vantage.
weatherApiKeyNotSet: Weather API key is not set.
newsApiKeySet: Naver API Client ID is set.
newsApiKeyNotSet: Naver API Client ID is not set.
newsApiSecretSet: Naver API Client Secret is set.
newsApiSecretNotSet: Naver API Client Secret is not set.
stockApiKeyNotSet: Stock API key is not set.
geminiApiKeyNotSet: Gemini API key is not set.
weatherApiKeyError: Failed to save weather API key:
newsApiKeySaved: Naver API Client ID saved successfully.
newsApiKeyError: Failed to save Naver API Client ID:
newsApiSecretSaved: Naver API Client Secret saved successfully.
newsApiSecretError: Failed to save Naver API Client Secret:
stockApiKeyError: Failed to save stock API key:
geminiApiKeyError: Failed to save Gemini API key:
ollamaApiDescription: Use Ollama's Gemma3:27b model installed on your local network to enable AI code generation and analysis features.
ollamaApiSetupMethod: Setup: Enter the HTTP API address of the Ollama server running on your local network. (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:11434)
ollamaApiUrlError: Failed to save Ollama API URL:
ollamaApiUrlNotSet: Ollama API URL is not set.
invalidUrlFormat: Please enter a valid URL format. (e.g., http://localhost:11434)
banyaLicenseDescription: Enter and verify AgentGoCoder license serial to use AgentGoCoder's advanced features.
banyaLicenseSectionDescription: Enter AgentGoCoder license serial to activate the product.
licenseNotSetMessage: License is not set. Please enter and verify the AgentGoCoder license in settings.
userModelsDescription: Add AI models by entering the provider, endpoint, and authentication directly.
userModelDeleteConfirm: Delete this user-defined model? The API key will also be removed.

githubSectionDescription: Check out AgentGoCoder's source code and latest information.
errorRetryDescription: Set the maximum number of automatic correction attempts when errors occur in the terminal. (1-10 times, default: 3 times)
